landing.sub:
Answer 21 questions and get your personalized
development field, learning roadmap, and course recommendations.

steps.title: Answer 21 Questions
steps.desc: Tell us about your goals, personality, and current situation

steps.title: AI Analysis
steps.desc: Claude AI analyzes your answers and recommends the best dev field for you

steps.title: Get Your Roadmap
steps.desc: Receive a step-by-step learning plan and verified course recommendations

landing.fieldTitle:
What kind of
developer do you want to be?
landing.whyDesc:
StarDev was born from the frustration of not knowing
where to start as a beginner developer.

reasons.title: Built for beginners
reasons.desc: We know the feeling of searching for hours and still being confused. StarDev is built to remove that barrier.

reasons.title: Inspired by StarDev
reasons.desc: Star — shine bright as a developer. Dev — build the future. We believe in the potential of every beginner.

reasons.title: A growing platform
reasons.desc: From AI tool directories to a developer community — we're building the ultimate resource hub for developers worldwide.

landing.ctaSub2: Your personalized roadmap is ready in 2 minutes

fields.name: Frontend
fields.desc: Build the interfaces users see and interact with

fields.name: Backend
fields.desc: Power apps with servers and databases

fields.name: Full Stack
fields.desc: Build complete apps from front to back

fields.name: Game
fields.desc: Build games people love to play

aiTools.title: AI Tool Hub
aiTools.desc: Curated AI tools for developers and creators — organized by category to help you work smarter.

categories.desc: AI coding tools to supercharge your development productivity

items.name: Cursor
items.desc: AI-powered code editor built on Claude & GPT-4. Write, edit, and debug code through natural conversation.

items.name: GitHub Copilot
items.desc: Code autocomplete tool by GitHub + OpenAI. Supports VS Code, JetBrains, and most popular editors.

items.name: Claude Code
items.desc: Anthropic's Claude directly in your terminal. File edits, code reviews, and deployments — all in one.

items.name: Codeium
items.desc: Free AI code autocomplete supporting 70+ languages. VS Code & JetBrains plugins available.

items.name: Tabnine
items.desc: AI coding assistant that runs locally. Code stays on your machine — ideal for teams with strict security requirements.

categories.desc: APIs to integrate AI capabilities directly into your products

items.name: Anthropic Claude API
items.desc: Call Claude models via API. Build document analysis, coding assistants, RAG pipelines, and agents.

items.name: OpenAI API
items.desc: Access GPT-4o, DALL-E, and Whisper via API. The most widely referenced AI platform.

items.name: Hugging Face
items.desc: Open-source AI model hub with hundreds of thousands of models. Use for free or fine-tune your own.

items.name: Vercel AI SDK
items.desc: SDK for easy AI streaming in Next.js & React. Supports Claude, GPT, and Gemini out of the box.

items.name: LangChain
items.desc: Framework for building LLM-powered apps. Easily compose RAG pipelines, agents, and chains.

categories.desc: AI tools for learning, documentation, and problem solving

items.name: Perplexity AI
items.desc: AI that searches the web in real-time. Especially useful for finding the latest library docs and debugging errors.

items.name: Phind
items.desc: AI search engine built for developers. Combines Stack Overflow, GitHub, and official docs to answer coding questions.

items.name: You.com
items.desc: AI search with a coding mode built in. Generate, debug, and explain code — all from a search interface.

categories.desc: AI design tools for frontend and UI developers

items.name: Midjourney
items.desc: One of the best AI image generators available. Perfect for thumbnails, illustrations, and branding assets.

items.name: DALL-E 3
items.desc: OpenAI's image generation AI. Available directly in ChatGPT Plus. Strong at generating images with text.

items.name: v0 by Vercel
items.desc: Generate React UI components from text descriptions. Dramatically reduces design work for frontend devs.

items.name: Adobe Firefly
items.desc: AI image generation integrated into the Adobe ecosystem. Works directly in Photoshop & Illustrator.

categories.desc: AI tools for YouTubers, video creators, and content producers

items.name: Runway ML
items.desc: Generate video from text or images using AI. Gen-3 model produces high-quality footage — a must-have for creators.

items.name: Pika Labs
items.desc: Convert text or images into video. Easy to use and popular for YouTube Shorts and Instagram Reels.

items.name: ElevenLabs
items.desc: AI voice generation tool. Supports 29 languages including Korean. Great for narration, podcasts, and voiceovers.

items.name: Descript
items.desc: AI video editor that lets you edit video like a text document. Auto captions, silence removal, and clip trimming.

items.name: HeyGen
items.desc: Create videos with an AI avatar that looks and sounds like you. Produce content in multiple languages effortlessly.

items.name: Kling AI
items.desc: High-quality AI video generator by Kuaishou. More free credits than Runway — low barrier to entry.

items.name: Kapwing
items.desc: Online AI video editor. Auto captions, background removal, video summarization — packed with creator features.

categories.desc: AI tools for documentation, collaboration, and note-taking

items.name: Notion AI
items.desc: AI-assisted writing, summarization, and translation inside Notion. Ideal for team wikis and dev docs.

items.name: Claude.ai
items.desc: Anthropic's conversational AI. Excellent for long document analysis, code reviews, and complex planning tasks.

items.name: Gamma
items.desc: AI that auto-generates presentations. Great for dev talk slides and investor pitch decks.

community.title:
Grow together
with developers
community.desc: From beginners to senior devs — a space to ask questions, share knowledge, and grow together.
community.ctaDesc: Be the first to know when the community opens

boards.name: Ask Anything
boards.desc: From dev terms to environment setup — any question is welcome here

boards.name: Code Review Requests
boards.desc: Share your code and get feedback from the community

boards.name: Side Project Teams
boards.desc: Find teammates or introduce your project to the community

boards.name: Study Groups
boards.desc: Form a group to learn and build together

boards.name: Mentor & Mentee Matching
boards.desc: Connect experienced mentors with those eager to learn
